storylets.title: {=duty_garrisoned_sword_form_1_title}Sword form at the post
storylets.setup: {=duty_garrisoned_sword_form_1_setup}The drill yard is quiet except for footwork and the knock of wasters. You work through the forms alone, slow enough to feel every error.

options.text: {=duty_garrisoned_sword_form_1_opt}Run the forms until they sit right.

storylets.title: {=duty_garrisoned_sparring_veteran_1_title}Paired against a veteran
storylets.setup: {=duty_garrisoned_sparring_veteran_1_setup}The sergeant pairs you with a soldier who has fought longer than you have been enlisted. He does not speak during the bout. His blade does his teaching.

options.tooltip: {=duty_garrisoned_sparring_veteran_1_tt}Hard sparring against a veteran. OneHanded XP.

storylets.title: {=duty_garrisoned_gate_stance_1_title}Gate-post watch
storylets.setup: {=duty_garrisoned_gate_stance_1_setup}Four hours at the gate. Traffic is thin. You run stance drills in your head, feet shifting on the stone, blade never leaving the scabbard.

storylets.title: {=duty_garrisoned_whetstone_1_title}Whetstone and slow work
storylets.setup: {=duty_garrisoned_whetstone_1_setup}An afternoon without orders. You pull a whetstone and work the edges — shortsword first, then the two-hander someone left leaning against the barracks wall.

options.tooltip: {=duty_garrisoned_whetstone_1_tt}Blade maintenance and form work. OneHanded + TwoHanded XP.

storylets.title: {=duty_garrisoned_spear_drill_1_title}Spear formation drill
storylets.setup: {=duty_garrisoned_spear_drill_1_setup}The sergeant lines you up in the yard and walks the row with a stick. Spacing, angle, advance — the same calls he's been making for twenty years.

options.text: {=duty_garrisoned_spear_drill_1_opt}Match his calls without watching the man beside you.

storylets.title: {=duty_garrisoned_pike_watch_1_title}Pike post on the wall
storylets.setup: {=duty_garrisoned_pike_watch_1_setup}Three hours holding a pike on the parapet. The weight tells in your shoulders long before the watch ends. You shift the butt and find what the old soldiers mean by grip.

options.tooltip: {=duty_garrisoned_pike_watch_1_tt}Wall watch with full kit. Polearm XP.

storylets.title: {=duty_garrisoned_formation_push_1_title}Shield and pike push
storylets.setup: {=duty_garrisoned_formation_push_1_setup}Two ranks press into each other across the courtyard. Not a real assault — just the feel of bodies and shafts in close space. Your legs know the difference by the end.

storylets.title: {=duty_garrisoned_wall_circuit_1_title}Circuit on the walls
storylets.setup: {=duty_garrisoned_wall_circuit_1_setup}The sergeant sends you around the walls at pace — twice before the bell, full kit, no dawdling. The stairs are the worst part. They always are.

options.tooltip: {=duty_garrisoned_wall_circuit_1_tt}Kit run on the walls. Athletics XP.

storylets.title: {=duty_garrisoned_stair_sprint_1_title}Stair sprints
storylets.setup: {=duty_garrisoned_stair_sprint_1_setup}The gatehouse stairs. Up, turn, down. The sergeant is timing. There is a wrong time to be slow and this is it.

storylets.title: {=duty_garrisoned_archery_butts_1_title}Archery butts
storylets.setup: {=duty_garrisoned_archery_butts_1_setup}The butts are set up behind the stables, forty paces out. You pull until your fingers are raw and your quiver is empty.

options.text: {=duty_garrisoned_archery_butts_1_opt}Work the draw until the groupings tighten.
options.tooltip: {=duty_garrisoned_archery_butts_1_tt}Range practice at the butts. Bow XP.

storylets.title: {=duty_garrisoned_range_competition_1_title}Range competition
storylets.setup: {=duty_garrisoned_range_competition_1_setup}A bet forms at the butts — bow against crossbow. You take the bow side. The crossbowman is slow and methodical. His bolts land tight. Yours do too, eventually.

options.tooltip: {=duty_garrisoned_range_competition_1_tt}Bow and crossbow practice. Bow + Crossbow XP.

storylets.title: {=duty_garrisoned_javelin_fence_1_title}Javelins at the fence
storylets.setup: {=duty_garrisoned_javelin_fence_1_setup}Someone sets up a painted timber at the far end of the yard. Half the watch tries their arm at it. Most miss by a stride. A few don't.

options.text: {=duty_garrisoned_javelin_fence_1_opt}Take your throws and count the hits.

storylets.title: {=duty_garrisoned_stable_work_1_title}Stable rotation
storylets.setup: {=duty_garrisoned_stable_work_1_setup}Your name is on the stable list. Feed, muck, tack check — two hours of it before the horses are ready for the afternoon rotation. The animals are indifferent to your effort.

storylets.title: {=duty_garrisoned_mounted_patrol_1_title}Mounted patrol outside the gates
storylets.setup: {=duty_garrisoned_mounted_patrol_1_setup}A short patrol loop outside the walls — three riders, no urgency. You note the lay of the ground and where a column might approach from the north. Old habit from the field.

options.tooltip: {=duty_garrisoned_mounted_patrol_1_tt}Mounted loop outside the walls. Riding + Scouting XP.

storylets.title: {=duty_garrisoned_parapet_repair_1_title}Parapet repair detail
storylets.setup: {=duty_garrisoned_parapet_repair_1_setup}A section of battlement needs relaying. The mason shows you once where to set the mortar and leaves. You work with the others until the stones sit level.

storylets.title: {=duty_garrisoned_gate_formation_1_title}Gate formation drill
storylets.setup: {=duty_garrisoned_gate_formation_1_setup}The sergeant arranges the gate guard into a reception line and drills the presentation — spacing, facing, order of response. You watch from the wall walk above, noting what he is building.

storylets.title: {=duty_garrisoned_mess_argument_1_title}Argument in the mess
storylets.setup: {=duty_garrisoned_mess_argument_1_setup}Two soldiers are about to throw hands over a gambling debt. The sergeant is at the far end of the hall. You are between them and the door.

storylets.title: {=duty_garrisoned_market_errand_1_title}Market errand
storylets.setup: {=duty_garrisoned_market_errand_1_setup}The quartermaster sends you to the market with a list and a purse. Not enough coin for what the list says. You are expected to sort the difference.

options.text: {=duty_garrisoned_market_errand_1_opt}Haggle what you can. Cover the rest.

storylets.title: {=duty_garrisoned_short_rations_1_title}Short rations
storylets.setup: {=duty_garrisoned_short_rations_1_setup}The ration-post line is shorter than the crowd waiting for it. Someone in the queue counts the portions out loud. The sergeant hears. Nobody looks happy.

storylets.title: {=duty_garrisoned_alert_posture_1_title}Alert posture
storylets.setup: {=duty_garrisoned_alert_posture_1_setup}The lord's captains have doubled the gate guard and moved the watch schedule forward. No one says why. The garrison drills harder than it did yesterday.

options.text: {=duty_garrisoned_alert_posture_1_opt}Keep your blade sharp and your watch honest.
options.tooltip: {=duty_garrisoned_alert_posture_1_tt}Alert drill under threat. Readiness up, OneHanded XP.

storylets.title: {=duty_garrisoned_wounded_ward_1_title}Wounded in the ward
storylets.setup: {=duty_garrisoned_wounded_ward_1_setup}The garrison surgeon has more patients than hands. You end up holding a man still while the saw does its work, and then doing the wound-dressing on three more through the afternoon.

options.text: {=duty_garrisoned_wounded_ward_1_opt}Learn the work. Keep your hands steady.

storylets.title: {=duty_garrisoned_new_threat_1_title}New threat on the road
storylets.setup: {=duty_garrisoned_new_threat_1_setup}Word comes in from a rider — something new is moving two days out. The captains want eyes on every approach. You get a post on the east wall and a description to memorize.
